divine ultra counts as the same turn, so you can apply buffs before ultra turn and maintain them inside, while normal ultra counts as the following turn which removes all temporary buffs/debuffs applied after entering. also in divine ultra turn the cards in your ultra bar are enhanced and you can use the enhanced version inside
but bursting in ultra term sucks in either version

for the normal ultra, if not pure ultra (all ultra or ultra + chaos characters) you suffer a hefty damage penalty while inside the ultra turn

oh nah, if it's pure ultra or ultra+chaos there's no damage penalty
but if it's like ultra+caro, or ultra+aequor, there is a damage penalty

for Haul them In, I only borrow a Whale arachne. 

you add 1-2 eternal loom in ultra bar, use the derived 0-cost to generate threads and then add a strike, defense or other cheap cards that are not Arachne's in the ultra bar to proc arachne pursuit later.

You funnel almost all embryos to Arachne, as well as rouse her to give her ailemus.

Once on ultra turn, you exalt Arachne, use one of the 0-cost to trigger pursuit on the main cat, use eternal loom when the main cat summons ads, use another 0-cost again to use arachne pursuit on the main cat, etc. repeat until finished.

I recommend putting Thais in the team so that you can dupe an eternal loom or a cheap card to keep triggering arachne pursuit

I just played all here cards and prayed
it generates a thread shown on the bar below your HP. looks like a purple ball of yarn. without it, arachne cant trigger pursuit

in addition, if you don't use the red 0 cost card, it gives Arachne ailemus on discarding it so if you already have 5 threads you can just leave it on your hand to be discarded on turn end  to give Arachne some ailemus
